prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约 46711→42237→8408→27791→32117，因含蒙古语授课等特殊批次，位次波动较大；2024 年起按物理类招生，近两年基准位次在 27791–32117 区间，2025 年基准约 32117 名；该校在吉林省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 44 人、2022 年 48 人、2023 年 45 人、2024 年 45 人、2025 年 46 人；2026 年计划 41 人，较 2025 年缩招约 10.9%，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 107 名，近年排名稳定在第 103–109 名区间，属中游 211 院校；2026 年声誉文件中未见该校明显负面或正面事件；抖音热度排名第 93，评价为「一般」，短视频平台曝光量处于中低水平，未出现报考关注度异常升温信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校断档信号；第五轮学科评估数据中未收录该校条目，无法直接映射招生专业与学科等级，该因素。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校工科优势方向匹配，对相关专业报考有正向拉动；吉林省 2026 年高考总人数约 110868 人，较 2025 年（111492 人）微降约 0.6%，按历史比例估算物理类考生约 79936 人，较 2025 年（80421 人）略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解；省控线方面，物理类本科批 2025 年 340 分、2024 年 345 分，特殊类型招生控制线 2025 年 479 分、2024 年 483 分，整体平稳略降；河北工业大学位于天津市，属跨省招生；该校在吉林省招生占比极小（约 1.5%–3%），地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 32117 名、2026 年计划缩招约 10.9%（推高位次数字）以及本省考生总数微降（缓解竞争），预计 2026 年最低位次约 30222 名，波动区间 29722–30722 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 46711→42237→8408→27791→32117, with significant fluctuations due to special batches such as Mongolian language instruction; starting from 2024, enrollment is under the physics category, with a baseline ranking range of 27791–32117 in the past two years, and a 2025 baseline of approximately 32117; the university's science/physics category plan in Jilin Province was 44 in 2021, 48 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 46 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 41, a reduction of about 10.9% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 107th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings in the 103–109 range in recent years, placing it among mid-tier 211 institutions; no significant negative or positive events were noted in the 2026 reputation documents; Douyin popularity ranking is 93rd, rated as 'average', with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no abnormal surge in application interest; no historical admission anomalies such as gaps were recorded; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this university, making it impossible to directly map enrollment majors to discipline levels, which is a factor.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science have consistently high social popularity, matching the university's engineering strengths, positively influencing applications for related majors; the total number of Gaokao examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is approximately 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 2025 (111,492), with an estimated 79,936 physics category examinees, slightly fewer than 2025 (80,421), slightly easing competition; regarding provincial control lines, the physics category undergraduate batch was 340 in 2025 and 345 in 2024, and the special type enrollment control line was 479 in 2025 and 483 in 2024, generally stable with a slight decline; Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, a cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is very small (about 1.5%–3%), making regional preference factors insignificant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 32,117, the 2026 enrollment plan reduction of about 10.9% (pushing the ranking number higher), and the slight decrease in the province's total examinees (easing competition), the estimated 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 30,222, with a fluctuation range of 29,722–30,722.

- Automation
- Data Science and Big Data Technology.

- Biomedical Engineering (not admitted if color weakness or color blindness)
- Bioengineering (not admitted if color weakness or color blindness)

- Industrial Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 29,722–30,722, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Tier 1 majors such as Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, and Electronic Information have historical admission rankings far below the school line, requiring a ranking significantly better than the lower bound of the range to attempt; Tier 2 majors such as Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, and Measurement and Control have a higher match with the predicted ranking and can be prioritized; Tier 3 majors in biology, chemistry, environment, materials, and management have relatively lower admission rankings, suitable for safety. Candidates with color weakness or color blindness should pay attention to relevant major restrictions.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 107th in 2026, belonging to mid-tier 211 institutions; no significant negative or positive events for this university in the 2026 reputation document; Douyin popularity ranking 93rd, rated as 'average', with stable application attention; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this university's entries, making it impossible to directly map enrollment majors and discipline levels, this factor.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's liberal arts enrollment majors mainly include Chinese International Education, Law (recruiting Mongolian ethnic candidates), and Ideological and Political Education, among which Law has a relatively hot social popularity recommendation, while Ideological and Political Education has stable popularity; the total number of college entrance examination takers in Jilin Province in 2026 is approximately 110,868, with an estimated history category examinees of about 30,932 based on historical proportions, slightly lower than 2025 (31,071), easing competition slightly; in terms of provincial control lines, the history category undergraduate batch was 384 points in 2025 and 369 points in 2024, while the special type enrollment control line was 493 points in 2025 and 479 points in 2024, showing an overall upward trend, reflecting some intensification of competition in the history category; Hebei University of Technology is located in Tianjin, belonging to cross-province enrollment; the university's liberal arts enrollment in Jilin Province accounts for a very small proportion, making regional preference factors insignificant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 7408, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining unchanged, a slight decrease in local history category examinees (easing competition), and an increase in provincial control lines (intensifying competition), the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 7358, with a fluctuation range of 6858–7858.

Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Ideological and Political Education
- Law (recruiting Mongolian ethnic candidates) (recruiting candidates with eligibility for the second category of the Eight-Province Collaboration Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6858–7858, the university has very few liberal arts enrollment majors (only 3). It is recommended to aim for Ideological and Political Education and Law as Tier 1 sprint targets, with Chinese International Education as a safety choice. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on the Ideological and Political Education major. Note that all majors are targeted at Mongolian ethnic candidates or candidates under the Eight-Province Collaboration Plan, so you need to confirm your eligibility when applying.
